title: Design System: 行业研究报告生成器

display.purpose: Page title only. Used once per view on the main header.

headline.purpose: Section headings within reports, modal titles.

body.purpose: Primary reading text. Max line length 70ch.

label.purpose: Button text, tab labels, metadata, field labels.

mono.purpose: Code blocks, technical data snippets in reports.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Indigo-tinted shadow on primary button hover. Lifts element 2px.

shadows.name: floating-panel
shadows.purpose: Minimal shadow for tab bar, sticky headers.

shadows.name: modal-backdrop
shadows.purpose: Deep shadow for modals and dialogs.

motion.name: state-change
motion.purpose: Standard easing for state transitions (hover, focus, active). Duration 150-250ms.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button. Full-width in Streamlit layout, centered on form submit.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #6366f1; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4f46e5; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(99,102,241,0.25), 0 2px 4px rgba(99,102,241,0.1); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #4338ca; transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: none; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #e2e4f0; color: #6b6d8a; cursor: not-allowed; box-shadow: none; transform: none; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Search/input field for industry name entry. Full-width with placeholder.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="例如：光模块 CPO、固态电池、人形机器人">
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; color: #1a1a2e; padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem; border: 1px solid #e2e4f0; border-radius: 12px; background: #ffffff; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b6d8a; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(99,102,241,0.15); }

components.name: Quick-Select Chip
components.description: Compact industry quick-select buttons displayed as a row of pills.
components.html: <button class="ds-chip">光模块 CPO</button><button class="ds-chip ds-chip-active">固态电池</button>
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #1a1a2e; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e2e4f0; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: #6366f1; background: #eeeffd; } .ds-chip-active { background: #6366f1; color: #ffffff; border-color: #6366f1; }

components.name: Sidebar
components.description: Left configuration panel with API key input, model selector, and metadata.
components.html:
⚙️ 配置
AnySearch实时搜索
技术栈：LangGraph + Streamlit
components.css: .ds-sidebar { background: #ffffff; border-right: 1px solid #e2e4f0; padding: 1.5rem; height: 100%; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-sidebar-header { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a2e; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .ds-sidebar-label { display: block; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #6b6d8a; margin-bottom: 0.375rem; } .ds-sidebar-input { width: 100%; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 0.625rem 0.875rem; border: 1px solid #e2e4f0; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #1a1a2e; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-sidebar-input:focus { border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,0.15); } .ds-sidebar-divider { height: 1px; background: #e2e4f0; margin: 1rem 0; } .ds-sidebar-meta { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6b6d8a; } .ds-sidebar-badge-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin: 0.75rem 0; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #eeeffd; color: #4f46e5; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Tab Bar
components.description: Markdown / HTML preview tabs for generated reports.
components.css: .ds-tab-bar { display: inline-flex; gap: 0; background: #ffffff; padding: 0.5rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border: 1px solid #f8f9fc; position: relative; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .ds-tab { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #6b6d8a; background: none; border: none; padding: 1rem 0; margin: 0 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s ease; position: relative; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #6366f1; } .ds-tab-active { color: #6366f1; } .ds-tab-indicator { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 1.5rem; width: 6rem; height: 3px; background: #6366f1; border-radius: 3px 3px 0 0; }

components.name: Progress Tracker
components.description: Background workflow progress bar with status message.
components.html: ⏳ 正在搜索分析报告... (65%)
components.css: .ds-progress-container { width: 100%; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-progress-label { display: block; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6b6d8a; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-progress-track { width: 100%; height: 8px; background: #e2e4f0; border-radius: 9999px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-progress-fill { height: 100%; background: #6366f1; border-radius: 9999px; transition: width 0.3s ease; }

components.name: Alert / Status Box
components.css: .ds-alert-success { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1a1a2e; background: #ffffff; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-alert-error { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #ef4444; background: #ffffff; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-alert-info { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6b6d8a; background: #ffffff; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }

narrative.overview:
A research tool that reads like a tech publication — crisp, editorial, with the energy of a newsroom rather than the silence of a dashboard. The design bridges professional credibility (trustworthy numbers, clear hierarchy) with the vibrant readability of modern tech media (36Kr, PingWest, The Verge). Every element is in service of the core loop: type an industry → see results. No decoration that doesn't earn its place.

The system explicitly rejects three adjacent aesthetics: the generic SaaS dashboard (gray cards, metric tiles, thin borders), the old-school financial terminal (dark navy, gold accents, dense grids), and the "AI tool" cliché (gradient text, glassmorphism, numbered section markers). It lands in the space between — clean like Linear, editorial like Stratechery, purposeful like a terminal but without the bloat.
keyCharacteristics: Content-forward. Search and reading are the primary tasks.
Low friction. The shortest path from input to output, surfaced in the UI.
One accent, restrained. Indigo-purple appears on ≤10% of the surface. Its rarity is the point.
Flat layout with intentional depth. Shadows only appear on interactive elements in hover state.
Single type family. Inter carries everything — no second font, no display face for headings.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Primary indigo-purple (#6366f1) is reserved for interactive states, active selection, and the primary action. Never decorative. Never on backgrounds.

rules.name: The No-Dashboard Rule
rules.body: Metric tiles, big-number hero sections, and sticky sidebar menus are forbidden. This is a search-and-read tool, not a monitoring console.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The primary accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point. If a screen has more than three indigo-purple elements, two of them should be removed or demoted to neutral.

rules.name: The Cool Baseline Rule
rules.body: Neutrals drift cool (toward 270–285° hue, chroma < 0.02). Never warm. A warm neutral on this canvas reads as a bug.

rules.name: The Body First Rule
rules.body: Body text at 1rem/400 is the design's anchor. Everything else sizes relative to it. If a heading looks too large, reduce it — display should never exceed 3.25rem on this surface.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to interaction.

dos: Do keep backgrounds neutral (Cool Canvas) — the indigo accent earns its place by being rare.
Do use `text-wrap: balance` on headings, `text-wrap: pretty` on body paragraphs.
Do cap body text line length at 70ch — research text needs readable line lengths.
Do use the pill shape (`{rounded.pill}`) only for badges and progress bars — everywhere else uses 8–16px.
Do use 150–250ms transitions for state changes — users are in flow, don't make them wait.
Do use skeleton loading states for report content — spinners are reserved for initialization only.
Do ensure body text contrast ≥4.5:1 against its background (Deep Charcoal on Cool Canvas passes at 14:1).
donts: Don't use gradient text (`background-clip: text` gradients) — verbatim from PRODUCT.md's anti-references.
Don't use glassmorphism, blur-backdrops, or frosted-glass effects — they belong nowhere in this system.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as decorative scaffolding above sections.
Don't use side-stripe borders (`border-left` > 1px as colored accent on cards or callouts).
Don't use big-number metric tiles — this is not a dashboard, this is a research tool.
Don't use display fonts or serifs for UI labels, buttons, or data — Inter carries everything.
Don't use dark mode as default — the scene is desktop office during work hours, ambient-lit, light mode fits.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing on animations — use cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) or similar ease-out curves.
Don't orchestrate page-load animations — content should appear immediately, not sequence in.
Don't use the primary accent on inactive states — only active/interactive/hover elements get indigo.
Don't use the SaaS grey-card-plus-icon-plus-label template for empty sections — design empty states that teach.
